blended.narrative: Welch Village is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 929 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: flurries, highs of 24°F, winds around 21 mph.
